src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update the Spring Boot servlet initializer import to the new package structure introduced in Spring Boot 2.0+.
Update the JHipster default profile utility import to the new package structure.
Update JHipster configuration imports from the old io.github.jhipster package to the new tech.jhipster package.
Update Environment.acceptsProfiles to use the new Profiles.of() API introduced in newer Spring versions.
Update import path for JHipsterConstants to reflect the package rename in newer JHipster versions.
Update import statements to reflect the migration from io.github.jhipster to tech.jhipster package namespace.
Replace deprecated Ehcache Duration/Expirations API with Java 8+ java.time.Duration and ExpiryPolicyBuilder.
Update import statements to use the new `tech.jhipster` package namespace instead of the old `io.github.jhipster` namespace.
Remove the AfterburnerModule bean because it is incompatible with Java 11 due to bytecode generation restrictions.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Removed import com.fasterxml.jackson.module.afterburner.AfterburnerModule and the afterburnerModule() bean definition.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update the import for ConstraintViolationProblemModule to reflect the package rename in the zalando-problem library.
Replace the deprecated WebMvcConfigurerAdapter class with the WebMvcConfigurer interface to comply with Spring Framework 5.x requirements.
Update the import for AngularCookieLocaleResolver to reflect the package rename from io.github.jhipster to tech.jhipster.
Update import statement to reflect the migration of JHipster configuration classes from the io.github.jhipster namespace to the tech.jhipster namespace.
